title: Cybersecurity Analyst
descriptionText:
**About the role**
We are building products in the Telecom space and are looking for a Cybersecurity Analyst to help ship impactful features.

**Responsibilities**
- Own end-to-end delivery from problem discovery to launch and iteration.
- Partner with cross-functional teams (engineering, design, data, GTM) to execute roadmap.
- Define success metrics and run experiments to improve key funnels.
- Translate user needs into clear requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

**Requirements**
- Experience with User Research and strong analytical thinking.
- Able to structure ambiguous problems and make data-informed trade-offs.
- Excellent written and verbal communication.
- Familiar with agile ways of working; can manage scope and timelines.

**Nice to have**
- Hands-on with User Research
- Experience working in Singapore/APAC markets
- Comfortable working with data and dashboards
